description: Style Note Casual dressing only gets better with these slip-on sandals from red tape. This pair is a great combination of style and functionality - they're a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Product Details Single piece thong style leather upper with stitched detailing, rivets and holes Well cushioned footbed Curved TPU outsole in ergonomic design multidirectional lugs Material and Care Leather Use a leather brush to remove dirt Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
